answer: Pacific-region gold loyalty shoppers on mobile web saw a drop in mobile checkout conversion on August 4, 2026 because variant B of exp-2026-q3-loyalty-wallet-accelerator wrote wallet eligibility with household_id instead of customer_profile_id, causing wallet_eligibility_cache reuse across linked profiles and marking eligible profiles ineligible before checkout. Remediation was to disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id.

facts.remediation: Disable variant B, purge wallet_eligibility_cache, and rebuild allocation by customer_profile_id.
facts.root_cause: Loyalty wallet eligibility cache reused household_id across linked profiles, marking eligible profiles ineligible before checkout.
